title: achnatherum clandestinum
intro: Achnatherum clandestinum, also known as False Needle Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Achnatherum clandestinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe respiratory tract irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create teas, or using the plant in tincture form to extract its medicinal properties.
